architectureDiagram: graph TD; Client[Next.js PWA Storefront] -->|GraphQL/REST| API_Gateway[Kong API Gateway]; API_Gateway --> Auth[Auth Service / Okta]; API_Gateway --> Catalog[Catalog & Search / Elasticsearch]; API_Gateway --> Cart[Cart & Checkout Service]; API_Gateway --> Inventory[Inventory & Pricing Engine]; API_Gateway --> ML[ML Recommendation Engine]; Catalog --> DB_Catalog[(PostgreSQL Catalog)]; Cart --> Redis[(Redis Cache)]; Cart --> Stripe[Stripe Payment Gateway]; Inventory --> ERP[SAP/Oracle ERP]; ML --> DataLake[(Data Lake)]; Client -->|State Management| Redux[Redux Toolkit / Zustand]; Redux --> Components[React Components];
componentStructure: HeroImmersive3D (WebGL/Three.js canvas, gesture controls, fallback video)
DynamicProductGrid (ML-driven recommendations, infinite scroll, WebP lazy loading)
ProductCard (Glassmorphism UI, hover tooltips, quick add-to-cart)
CheckoutSPA (Single-page checkout, inline validation, Stripe Elements)
DynamicPricingBuilder (Visual IF/THEN rule builder, simulation mode)
B2BBulkOrderMatrix (CSV upload parser, spreadsheet UI, inline editing)
LoyaltyPortal (Progress bar, points ledger, confetti animation)
AdminRBACManager (Role assignment, audit logs, SSO integration)
GlobalFooter (Newsletter signup, dynamic links, WCAG compliance)
ModalManager (Dynamic rendering of quick views, reward redemptions, alerts)
wireframes: [LANDING PAGE] The user arrives at a breathtaking Modern Obsidian interface. The background is a deep, rich charcoal (#0B0C10) with subtle, dynamic mesh gradients in neon cyan (#66FCF1) and muted magenta. The Hero section features a full-viewport WebGL 3D model of the flagship product. As the user moves their mouse, the model rotates smoothly at 60fps, casting real-time ray-traced shadows on a glassmorphic pedestal. A sleek, minimalist navigation bar floats at the top with a frosted glass effect (backdrop-filter: blur(12px)), housing the Semantic Search Bar which expands fluidly on click. [CONTENT GRIDS] Scrolling down reveals the For You personalized product grid. The grid uses a masonry layout. Each Product Card is a masterpiece of UI: a dark, semi-transparent card with a 1px solid border of white at 10% opacity. Hovering over a card triggers a micro-animation where the product image scales up by 1.05x, and a glowing Why we recommend this tooltip fades in using a spring physics transition. [DATA DASHBOARDS] The Supply Chain Admin Dashboard is a masterclass in data visualization. A massive D3.js geographical heatmap dominates the center, glowing with pulsing red nodes where inventory is critically low. To the right, a predictive timeline chart uses Recharts to forecast stock depletion, featuring smooth bezier curves and interactive hover states that display exact SKU counts. [MODALS] The Quick View and Loyalty Redemption modals slide up from the bottom of the screen with a fluid, easing transition. They feature a deep obsidian background with a subtle noise texture overlay to add depth. The typography uses Outfit for bold, geometric headers and Inter for highly legible body text. [FOOTER] The Global Footer anchors the experience with a multi-column layout, featuring a sleek newsletter input field with a glowing submit button that morphs into a checkmark upon success. The entire journey is seamless, devoid of jarring page reloads, and exudes a premium, state-of-the-art aesthetic.
apiEndpoints: GET /api/v1/recommendations?userId={uuid} -> Returns 200 OK with { items: Product[] }. Uses Redis cache. Fallback to trending items if user lacks history.
POST /api/v1/checkout/intent -> Body: { cartId, shippingAddress }. Returns 200 OK with { clientSecret, taxAmount, shippingCost }. Integrates with Stripe API.
GET /api/v1/inventory/predictive -> Returns 200 OK with { heatMapData: GeoJSON, alerts: Alert[] }. Uses WebSockets for real-time updates.
POST /api/v1/pricing/simulate -> Body: { ruleId, historicalDateRange }. Returns 200 OK with { projectedRevenue, marginImpact }.
GET /api/v1/search?q={query}&filters={facets} -> Returns 200 OK with { results: Product[], facets: Facet[], suggestions: String[] }. Backed by Elasticsearch.
POST /api/v1/b2b/bulk-upload -> Body: FormData(CSV). Returns 207 Multi-Status with { successful: SKU[], errors: Error[] }.
GET /api/v1/shipping/track/{orderId} -> Returns 200 OK with { status: String, coordinates: {lat, lng}, timeline: Event[] }.
designSystem: Theme: Modern Obsidian. Visual Principles: Elite, hyper-modern, immersive, and frictionless. Color Palette: Primary Background is Deep Obsidian (#0B0C10), Secondary Background is Charcoal Surface (#1F2833). Primary Accents are Neon Cyan (#66FCF1) for primary actions and Electric Magenta (#FF007F) for notifications and badges. Success states use Emerald Green (#00FF7F), while Error states use Crimson Red (#FF4C4C). Typography: Outfit for all Headings (H1-H6) to provide a geometric, futuristic, and premium feel. Inter for all body copy, forms, and data tables to ensure maximum legibility and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Spacing System: Based on a strict 8px linear scale (e.g., 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 64px) to maintain perfect vertical and horizontal rhythm. Shadows & Depth: Extensive use of Glassmorphism. Surfaces utilize background-color: rgba(31, 40, 51, 0.6) with backdrop-filter: blur(16px) and a 1px solid border of rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08). Drop shadows are multi-layered, e.g., box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2). Micro-animations: All interactive elements feature fluid transitions using cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) with durations between 200ms and 400ms. Buttons feature a subtle scale-up (transform: scale(1.02)) and a glowing box-shadow on hover. The overall aesthetic is state-of-the-art, resembling a high-end fintech or luxury automotive interface, ensuring the user feels they are interacting with a premium, next-generation platform.
